nasb.text: In those days and at that time I will cause a righteous Branch of David to spring forth; and He shall execute justice and righteousness on the earth.

esv.text: In those days and at that time I will cause a righteous Branch to spring up for David, and he shall execute justice and righteousness in the land.

cnv.text: 在那些日子、那時候，我必使大衛公義的苗裔長起來；他必在地上施行公正和公義。

ccb.text: 那时，我要使大卫公义的苗裔兴起，他要在地上秉公行义。
